text.title: Agent Trajectory Eval Method Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from raw trace logs to a signed trajectory-eval report.

step.name: freeze-golden-set
step.action: Assemble ≥30 entries of {task, expected_tools[], expected_order, allowed_alternatives}. Tag with set_version. Commit to repo (immutable).
step.decision-gate: If <30 entries available, escalate to QA owner.

step.name: score-per-layer
step.input: Frozen golden set; agent version under test; replay harness from [[agent-replay-harness-cookbook]].
step.action: For each entry: run the agent, compute system_efficiency (latency_ms, tokens, tool_calls), session_quality (exact_match, precision, recall vs expected_tools), node_precision (tool_selection accuracy, param accuracy).

step.name: aggregate-with-ci
step.action: For each metric: compute mean + 95% CI via bootstrap (1000 resamples) or t-distribution.

step.name: judge-calibration-check
step.input: If any layer uses LLM-as-judge: human-labelled calibration set + current judge model.
step.action: Verify judge_calibration_date is ≤90 days. If older, re-calibrate against ≥20 human labels.
step.decision-gate: If recalibration shifts judge by >5 points, re-score the run before publishing.

step.name: emit-report-and-validate
step.action: Compose report per content/02-output-contract.xml; run scripts/validate-output.py; route to named QA owner.
step.output: Validated report; promotion gate updated with the new metrics.
